characters.name: Adramelech
characters.description: AdramelechJapaneseアドラメレクRōmajiAdoramerekuOfficial EnglishAdrammelech (VIZ)Character InformationStatusAliveSpeciesDevilGenderUnknownMagic AttributeLight MagicAffiliationSquadSpecial Reserve CorpsCountryClover KingdomDebutMangaChapter 317Image GalleryAdramelech「アドラメレクAdoramereku」[1]is ahighest-ranking devilconnected to theTree of Qliphothand resides on the second level of the underworld.[2]DuringJudgement Day, Adramelech makes a contract withYami Sukehiro.[3] Adramelech has a slender, average-height figure, long pointed ears, and two pairs of horns—one pair are large and curved like a rams' and the others are curved and point upward. The devil's body is clothed in a dark-colored material with small sacs or scales hanging off its arms, legs, wings, and back. It has a long, thin, prehensile tail that curls at the tip. Like mostdevils, Adramelech looks down onhumansand their abilities.[4][5]The devil is apathetic, opting to warn the humans rather than attack them[2]and later to continue watching Lucifero fight rather than take over when the King of Devils demands it.[6]He has come to view humans as interesting and exciting beings after witnessing everyone fight and beat Lucifero with desperate and surprising strength, especially Yami, and doesn't like boring things like the world that Lucius wants to create. He wants to experience the thrill that humans can give.

The devil's body is clothed in a dark-colored material with small sacs or scales hanging off its arms, legs, wings, and back. It has a long, thin, prehensile tail that curls at the tip. Like mostdevils, Adramelech looks down onhumansand their abilities.[4][5]The devil is apathetic, opting to warn the humans rather than attack them[2]and later to continue watching Lucifero fight rather than take over when the King of Devils demands it.[6]He has come to view humans as interesting and exciting beings after witnessing everyone fight and beat Lucifero with desperate and surprising strength, especially Yami, and doesn't like boring things like the world that Lucius wants to create. He wants to experience the thrill that humans can give.

characters.name: Astaroth
characters.description: AstarothJapaneseアスタロトRōmajiAsutarotoOfficial EnglishAstaroth (VIZ)Character InformationStatusAliveSpeciesDevilGenderUnknownMagic AttributeTime MagicDebutMangaChapter 331(mentioned)Image GalleryAstaroth「アスタロトAsutaroto」 is ahighest-ranking devilconnected to theTree of Qliphothand one of the three rulers of the underworld, residing on the lowest level until the devil's mysterious disappearance.[1]The devil has contracted withLucius ZogratisandJulius Novachrono.[2] Astaroth, alongsideLuciferoandBeelzebub, rules over the underworld from the lowest level. At some point, Astaroth disappears from the underworld and its place is taken byMegicula.[1]

characters.name: Baal
characters.description: BaalJapaneseバアルRōmajiBaaruOfficial EnglishBaal (VIZ)Character InformationStatusAliveSpeciesDevilGenderUnknownMagic AttributeAir MagicDebutMangaChapter 365(mentioned)Image GalleryBaal「バアルBaaru」 is ahighest-ranking devil. ForJudgment Day,Lucius Zogratisincarnates the devil inDamnatio Kira, transforming him into aPaladin.[1] AfterLucius Zogratisventures into the underworld and takes control of the remaining highest-ranking devils, Lucius incarnates and purifies Baal insideDamnatio Kira.[1]

characters.name: Beelzebub
characters.description: MangaAnimeBeelzebubJapaneseベルゼブブRōmajiBeruzebubuOfficial EnglishBeelzebub (VIZ)Character InformationStatusAliveSpeciesDevilGenderUnknownMagic AttributeSpatial MagicAffiliationCountrySpade KingdomDebutMangaChapter 238AnimeEpisode 161Image GalleryBeelzebub「ベルゼブブBeruzebubu」[1]is ahighest-ranking devilconnected to theTree of Qliphothand one of the three rulers of the underworld, residing on the lowest level.[2]Beelzebub has contracted withZenon Zogratis, a member of theSpade Kingdom'sDark Triad.[3] Prior toJudgment Day,Lucius Zogratisincarnates the devil inLily Aquaria, transforming her into aPaladin.[4] Beelzebub's face

characters.name: Five-headed dragon
characters.description: Five-headed dragonJapanese五頭龍RōmajiGozuryūOfficial EnglishFive-headed dragon (VIZ)Character InformationStatusDeceasedSpeciesDragonGenderUnknownAffiliationCountryHino CountryDebutMangaChapter 342Image GalleryThefive-headed dragon「五頭龍gozuryū」 is a legendary beast that once rampaged in theHino Countrybefore it was sealed beneath the waters ofGoshu.[1]After being unsealed and purified by three ofLucius Zogratis'sPaladins,[2]the dragon is eventually slain through the combined efforts of theRyuzen SevenandAsta.[3] The five-headed dragon is a gigantic dragon large enough to rival a city in size, and true to its name, it has five heads on long, scaly, serpentine necks, each with its own unique head shape and form, sets of horns, spikes, and pairs of eyes. The rest of its massive body is hidden beneath the sea it resides in. The five-headed dragon appears to be a mindlessly destructive and territorial creature.[1]It also has an aggressive streak, and has a tendency to be easily enraged if attacked or confronted. The extent of its whole personality prior to being summoned by Yrul is unclear.

characters.name: Five-headed dragon
characters.description: Five-headed dragonJapanese五頭龍RōmajiGozuryūOfficial EnglishFive-headed dragon (VIZ)Character InformationStatusDeceasedSpeciesDragonGenderUnknownAffiliationCountryHino CountryDebutMangaChapter 342Image GalleryThefive-headed dragon「五頭龍gozuryū」 is a legendary beast that once rampaged in theHino Countrybefore it was sealed beneath the waters ofGoshu.[1]After being unsealed and purified by three ofLucius Zogratis'sPaladins,[2]the dragon is eventually slain through the combined efforts of theRyuzen SevenandAsta.[3] The five-headed dragon is a gigantic dragon large enough to rival a city in size, and true to its name, it has five heads on long, scaly, serpentine necks, each with its own unique head shape and form, sets of horns, spikes, and pairs of eyes. The rest of its massive body is hidden beneath the sea it resides in. The five-headed dragon appears to be a mindlessly destructive and territorial creature.[1]It also has an aggressive streak, and has a tendency to be easily enraged if attacked or confronted. The extent of its whole personality prior to being summoned by Yrul is unclear.

characters.name: Gimodelo
characters.description: GimodeloJapaneseギモデロRōmajiGimoderoOfficial EnglishGimodelo (VIZ, Funimation)Character InformationStatusAliveSpeciesDevilGenderUnknownAffiliationSquadBlack BullCountryClover KingdomDebutMangaChapter 261AnimeEpisode 168Voice ActorsEnglishRay ChaseImage GalleryGimodelo「ギモデロGimodero」 is a mid-rankingdevil[1]who servesNacht Faust, the vice-captain of theClover Kingdom'sBlack Bullsquad of theMagic Knights.[2] Gimodelo as a devil familiar As a devil familiar, Gimodelo appears as a small, dark-colored figure with horns, wings, a tail, and pointed teeth.

characters.name: Lilith
characters.description: LilithJapaneseリリスRōmajiRirisuOfficial EnglishLilith (VIZ)Character InformationStatusDeceasedSpeciesDevilGenderUnknownMagic AttributeDemon Ice MagicEyesBlueHairWhiteDebutMangaChapter 279Image GalleryLilith「リリスRirisu」 is one of the highest-rankingdevilsconnected to theTree of Qliphothand resides on the first level of the underworld, alongsideNahamah.[1] Lilith's color scheme Lilith is a tall, curvaceous humanoid with long, white hair, blue eyes, and black lips. Lilith's face and neck are heavily wrinkled, and Lilith has a black mask that covers the upper-right quarter of Lilith's face and extends back past the ear. Lilith also has a pair of upward pointing, black horns; the right horn juts out of the mask and is longer than the left horn.

characters.name: Lucifugus
characters.description: LucifugusJapaneseルキフグスRōmajiRukifugusuOfficial EnglishLucifugus (VIZ)Character InformationStatusAliveSpeciesDevilGenderUnknownMagic AttributeDark MagicDebutMangaChapter 286Image GalleryLucifugus「ルキフグスRukifugusu」 is one of the highest-rankingdevilsconnected to theTree of Qliphoth.[1]ForJudgment Day,Lucius Zogratisincarnates the devil inMorgen Faust, transforming him into aPaladin.[2] Lucifugus has a tall, slender figure, long pointed ears, two large ox-like horns, a pair of wings, and a long, prehensile tail. Lucifugus kills the rest of House Faust.

characters.name: Nahamah
characters.description: NahamahJapaneseナハマーRōmajiNahamāOfficial EnglishNaamah (VIZ)Character InformationStatusDeceasedSpeciesDevilGenderUnknownMagic AttributeDemon Fire MagicEyesOrangeHairWhiteDebutMangaChapter 279Image GalleryNahamah「ナハマーNahamā」[1]is one of the highest-rankingdevilsconnected to theTree of Qliphothand resides on the first level of the underworld, alongsideLilith.[2] Nahamah's color scheme Nahamah is a tall, androgynous humanoid with long, white hair, orange eyes, and black lips. Nahamah's face and neck are heavily wrinkled, and Nahamah has a black mask that covers the upper-left quarter of Nahamah's face and extends back past the ear. Nahamah also has a pair of downward pointing, black horns; the left horn juts out of the mask and is longer than the right horn.

characters.name: Salamander
characters.description: SalamanderJapaneseサラマンダーRōmajiSaramandāOfficial EnglishSalamander (VIZ, Funimation)AliasSpirit of Fire 「火の精霊Hi no Seirei」[1]Character InformationStatusAliveSpeciesSpiritGenderUnknownMagic AttributeFire MagicAffiliationSquadCrimson LionEye of the Midnight Sun(former)DebutMangaChapter 51AnimeEpisode 36Voice ActorsJapaneseKenichirō MatsudaImage GallerySalamander「サラマンダーSaramandā」 is thespiritoffireand servesFana[1]and laterFuegoleon Vermillion.[2] Salamander is an orange-scaled reptile with four legs, two wings and a tail, like a small dragon. In its initial appearance, Salamander is small enough to sit on Fana's shoulder.[1]As it matures, it grows much larger, surpassing Fana in height.[3]
